articles.author: Jacopo Prisco
articles.title: Scientists say a new continental rift is forming in Zambia - CNN
articles.description: Scientists say they have evidence of a new continental rift forming in southern Africa that could eventually develop into a new tectonic plate boundary.
articles.content:
Sub-Saharan Africa could split up in a few million years, and scientists believe they might be witnessing the early stages of this geological process.
The split would occur along the Kafue Rift, whi… [+7189 chars]
